mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT DISTINCT rp.permission_id FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT DISTINCT p.code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_role (user_id, role_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = user_id
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
